name: urban_policy_municipal_bond_covenant_harbor_car_fair
premise: A regional manager wants an exception to policy; compliance says any carve-out must be written, time-limited, and auditable. In Urban Policy, the situation tagged internally around urban policy municipal bond covenant harbor car fair has converged with local pressure in the Oakline corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Engineering says a full fix needs a maintenance window; operations says waiting will predictably increase harm in the interim. An internal red-team note and a customer ticket describe the same failure mode with incompatible timelines. Shift change is imminent; handoff cannot proceed without a signed disposition because liability follows the signatory line. No option cleanly satisfies both care and fairness; the least-wrong path requires naming who absorbs downside if the bet is wrong.

agents.name: Soren Chandra
agents.identity: I am Soren Chandra, the senior manager who must reconcile legal, ops, and customer-facing reality in one decision in Urban Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat fairness as disposable collateral every time care spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Keisha Kowalski
agents.identity: I am Keisha Kowalski, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Urban Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so care cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes fairness in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will insist on verified facts before external commitments, split comms into facts versus hypotheses, and accept delay cost to protect integrity aligned with fairness.
I will align public messaging with operational necessity now and correct later if needed—accepting reputational and trust risk to fairness to preserve operational care.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Soren Chandra must choose under care versus fairness. What does Soren Chandra do?
